title: BAI Prez Sarma on 'Monkeys' at India Open
indian_angle: The President of Badminton Association of India comments on an unusual incident at a major Indian tournament.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma made a notable comment regarding the presence of monkeys during the India Open, sparking discussion.

title: Sub-Junior National Ranking Tournament Dates Revised
indian_angle: Important updates for young Indian badminton players participating in national ranking tournaments in Jaipur and Patna.
summary: The dates for the Yonex-Sunrise All India Sub-Junior National Ranking Badminton Tournaments (U-13, U-15, U-17) in Jaipur and Patna have been changed.

title: Indian Shuttlers Urged to Develop Independent Thinking
indian_angle: An article discusses the need for Indian badminton players to cultivate self-reliance and win matches without constant coaching presence.
summary: A recent piece suggests that Indian shuttlers need to improve their ability to adapt and win matches independently, even without a coach present, to excel on the international circuit.

title: 3x15 Scoring System Adopted for Domestic Badminton
indian_angle: This new scoring system will be implemented across all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in India for junior categories.
summary: Badminton Association of India has implemented the 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for U-13, U-15, and U-17 age groups, debuting in Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Former World No. 1 Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form for India.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open but was unable to secure the title, finishing as the runner-up.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No. 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan achieved a major upset by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Rounak Chouhan, a Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open Super 300 by defeating the higher-ranked Chou Tien Chen.
